subheadline: A complete suite of tools designed for modern teams.

feature_items.title: Smart Notifications
feature_items.description: Contextual alerts that keep you informed without overwhelming your inbox.

feature_items.title: Universal Search
feature_items.description: Find anything across all your projects, documents, and conversations instantly.

feature_items.title: Custom Reports
feature_items.description: Build reports with drag-and-drop widgets and share them with your team.

feature_items.title: Bi-Directional Sync
feature_items.description: Keep data in sync across all connected tools automatically.
